text:
In the first scene, I feel a gentle anticipation—perhaps akin to standing backstage before a performance. The emptiness and the ordered space invite reflection. The presence of safety equipment reminds me of the contingencies of life, even in quiet moments.

In the second scene, surrounded by color and the symbols of research and development, I sense curiosity and vibrancy. Here, I am energized, drawn in by humanity's quest for knowledge. The juxtaposition of text, technology, and design urges me to contemplate how innovation shapes our relationships with each other and the world.
